tool_args.label: Bus Camera Security System Maintenance Contract Award

payload.project_name: Bus Camera Security System Maintenance Contract
payload.description: Three-year base plus three 2-year options miscellaneous service contract for maintenance and support services for the MTA Bus Camera Security System (BCSS)

evidence_refs.source_quote: NYC Transit is seeking Board approval to award a three-year estimated quantity miscellaneous service contract for the provision of maintenance and support services for the MTA Bus Camera Security System

payload.description: Total estimated amount including base and options for BCSS maintenance contract (Contract# 440943)

evidence_refs.source_quote: Total Estimated Amount: $75,433,846 (Base + Options)

payload.description: Base contract amount for BCSS maintenance (three-year base)

evidence_refs.source_quote: Base Contract $25,712,566

payload.description: Options amount for BCSS maintenance (three 2-year options)
Total number of buses equipped with BCSS as of January 2024

evidence_refs.source_quote: NYC Transit and MTA Bus Company have a total of 5,248 buses equipped with BCSS

payload.description: Buses equipped with Seon BCSS

evidence_refs.source_quote: 5,195 from Seon

payload.description: Buses equipped with Apollo BCSS

evidence_refs.source_quote: 53 from Apollo Video Technology ["Apollo"]

payload.raw_value_text: approximately 3,656 buses have been delivered with BCSS preinstalled at the factory
payload.description: Buses delivered with BCSS preinstalled at the factory

evidence_refs.source_quote: approximately 3,656 buses have been delivered with BCSS preinstalled at the factory

payload.raw_value_text: Twenty-nine firms requested the RFP package, of which two submitted proposals
payload.description: RFP solicitation statistics for BCSS maintenance contract

evidence_refs.source_quote: Twenty-nine firms requested the RFP package, of which two submitted proposals: RL Controls LLC ("RL") and Seon

payload.raw_value_text: $79,684 or 0.28 percent less than its initial proposal of $28,649,504
payload.description: Seon's BAFO was $79,684 less than its initial proposal

evidence_refs.source_quote: Seon's BAFO was in the total amount of $28,569,820, which was $79,684 or 0.28 percent less than its initial proposal of $28,649,504

payload.raw_value_text: $18,902,266 for hardware and software maintenance, non-warranty repairs and server licenses
payload.description: Hardware and software maintenance portion of BCSS contract award

evidence_refs.source_quote: award to Seon will consist of $18,902,266 for hardware and software maintenance, non-warranty repairs and server licenses

payload.description: Video Data Management services portion of BCSS contract award

evidence_refs.source_quote: $6,810,300 for VDMs

payload.description: Savings from scope change for base contract

evidence_refs.source_quote: DOB agreed to incorporate a proposed scope change for which both companies provided alternative pricing resulting in a savings of $1,251,512 for the base

payload.description: Additional savings from scope change if all options are exercised

evidence_refs.source_quote: if all options are exercised, will result in an additional savings of $935,220

payload.raw_value_text: Seon provided unilateral price concessions ... savings of $1,605,742 for the base
payload.description: Savings from Seon unilateral price concessions for base contract

evidence_refs.source_quote: Seon provided unilateral price concessions for the monthly maintenance service and the VDMs resulting in savings of $1,605,742 for the base

payload.description: Additional savings from Seon unilateral price concessions if all options are exercised

evidence_refs.source_quote: if all options are exercised, additional savings of $1,699,200 will be achieved

payload.raw_value_text: A total savings of $2,857,254 will be achieved for the base contract
payload.description: Total savings achieved for base contract through negotiations and competition

evidence_refs.source_quote: A total savings of $2,857,254 will be achieved for the base contract

payload.description: Total additional savings if all options are exercised

evidence_refs.source_quote: if all options are exercised, an additional $2,634,420 will be saved

payload.description: Seon's Best and Final Offer total amount

evidence_refs.source_quote: Seon's BAFO was in the total amount of $28,569,820

payload.description: Seon's initial proposal amount

evidence_refs.source_quote: initial proposal of $28,649,504

payload.description: NYCT Committee meeting date for procurement review of BCSS contract

evidence_refs.source_quote: Committee 01/29/24

payload.description: Board meeting date for procurement approval of BCSS contract
Best and Final Offers received from proposers

evidence_refs.source_quote: Best and Final Offers ("BAFOs") were received on December 1, 2023

payload.description: Selection Committee evaluated BAFOs in accordance with evaluation criteria

evidence_refs.source_quote: presented to the SC for consideration on December 5, 2023

payload.claim_text: The BCSS allows video images to be captured on buses and then wirelessly uploaded along with a system health report from the buses to depot servers during the refueling process for use in managing data and ensuring proper operation of the onboard equipment.
payload.description: Description of how the Bus Camera Security System operates

evidence_refs.source_quote: The BCSS allows video images to be captured on buses and then wirelessly uploaded along with a system health report from the buses to depot servers during the refueling process

tool_args.label: Contract Class A and Class B structure

payload.claim_text: The price proposals contained two classes: Class A was structured to provide a monthly rate to provide hardware and software maintenance for all BCSS equipped buses, hardware and labor pricing for non-warranty repairs, training, and pricing for server licenses. Class B was structured to provide monthly rates for Video Data Management services ("VDMs").
payload.description: Two-class pricing structure for BCSS maintenance contract

evidence_refs.source_quote: The price proposals contained two classes: Class A was structured to provide...

issues: evidence_refs[0].source_quote is not present in the cited block

payload.claim_text: The MTA Department of Diversity and Civil Rights (DDCR) has established goals of 15 percent MBE, 15 percent WBE, and 6 percent SDVOD on this contract.
payload.description: Diversity and civil rights goals for the BCSS maintenance contract

evidence_refs.source_quote: The MTA Department of Diversity and Civil Rights (DDCR) has established goals of 15 percent MBE, 15 percent WBE, and 6 percent SDVOD on this contract.

payload.claim_text: Total funding for this contract is available in the operating budget.
payload.description: Funding source for the BCSS maintenance contract

evidence_refs.source_quote: Total funding for this contract is available in the operating budget.

tool_args.label: Seon certified not doing business in Russia

payload.claim_text: Seon has certified that pursuant to EO 16, it is not doing business in Russia.
payload.description: Certification of compliance with Executive Order 16

evidence_refs.source_quote: Seon has certified that pursuant to EO 16, it is not doing business in Russia.

payload.claim_text: The contract resulting from this procurement has been evaluated to determine the necessity and appropriate scope, if any, of cybersecurity terms and conditions and requirements... Any applicable cybersecurity terms and conditions and requirements, to the extent required, have been included in the contract terms and conditions.
payload.description: Cybersecurity evaluation for BCSS contract

evidence_refs.source_quote: The contract resulting from this procurement has been evaluated to determine the necessity and appropriate scope, if any, of cybersecurity terms and conditions

tool_args.label: Contract Class A and Class B structure

payload.claim_text: The price proposals contained two classes: Class A was structured to provide a monthly rate to provide hardware and software maintenance for all BCSS equipped buses, hardware and labor pricing for non-warranty repairs, training, and pricing for server licenses. Class B was structured to provide monthly rates for Video Data Management services.
payload.description: Two-class pricing structure for BCSS maintenance contract
